title: Optimizing a proteomics platform for urine biomarker discovery.
author: Afkarian M Bhasin M Dillon ST Guerrero MC Nelson RG Knowler WC Thadhani R Libermann TA
content: S-EPMC2957724 PMC2957724 Optimizing a proteomics platform for urine biomarker discovery. Biomarker discovery approaches in urine have been hindered by concerns for reproducibility and inadequate standardization of proteomics protocols. In this study, we describe an optimized quantitative proteomics
